summary: Web-based food ordering demo with restaurant menu browser, cart system, and mock order management using Internet Identity
architectural_notes: Simplified without real GPS tracking, payment gateways, or external databases
Mock order system instead of real delivery automation
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Restaurant registration form banner showing a welcoming restaurant interior with warm lighting (restaurant-register-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- Menu item upload placeholder icon showing a plate with utensils in warm orange tones (menu-upload-icon.dim_256x256.png)

existing_features.title: Implement Internet Identity authentication for customers allowing users to sign in and maintain their session across the application
Create a restaurant listing page that displays multiple restaurants with their business name, logo, cuisine type, opening hours, and preparation time

Build a menu browsing system for each restaurant showing food items organized by categories (Veg, Non-Veg, Beverages, Desserts, Snacks) with item name, description, price, preparation time, and food type indicators
Implement menu filtering functionality allowing users to filter items by category (Veg, Non-Veg, Beverages, Desserts, Snacks) and availability status
Create a shopping cart system that allows users to add/remove items, adjust quantities, and view the cart contents with real-time price updates
Implement automatic price calculation in the cart showing subtotal, mock platform fee, mock delivery charges, and total amount
Build a mock order placement system that captures customer orders with selected items, quantities, total price, and estimated preparation time, storing them in the backend
Create an order history view for customers showing their past orders with order ID, restaurant name, items ordered, total amount, order date, and mock order status
Implement mock order status progression showing orders moving through states: Confirmed → Preparing → Out for Delivery → Delivered with visual status indicators

Design a creative, modern visual theme with a distinct style for the food ordering platform that emphasizes food imagery, vibrant colors (avoiding blue and purple), appetizing typography, and card-based layouts with food photography placeholders
Create a restaurant registration form page accessible to authenticated users with input fields for restaurant name, address, logo URL, cuisine type, opening hours, and average preparation time
Update the RestaurantCard component to display the restaurant address beneath the cuisine type
Update the MenuItemCard component to display menu item images using the image URL from the backend, showing a placeholder if no image is provided

Create a menu item management interface for restaurant owners to add menu items with name, description, price, category, food type, preparation time, availability toggle, and image URL after registering their restaurant

new_feature_requests.summary: Shopping cart system with price calculation
Seed the backend with sample restaurant data including at least 3-5 restaurants with complete menus, categories, items, prices, and preparation times to demonstrate the platform functionality
Restaurant registration system allowing hotels/restaurants to register with name, address, menu items with prices, and images that customers can browse
Extend the backend Restaurant type to include an address field (text) and update all sample data initialization to include addresses for existing restaurants

Create a backend function to register new restaurants with name, address, logo URL, cuisine type, opening hours, and average preparation time, returning the newly created restaurant with a generated ID

Add a backend function to associate menu items with prices (already part of MenuItem type) and visual image URLs to a specific restaurant, allowing registration of menu items with name, description, price, category, food type, preparation time, availability, and image URL
